Pushable blocks can be shoved if adjacent in the move direction, but walls and certain boundaries block movement. Heuristic 'blocked' hints don't always mean action is impossible—some interactions allow movement through or around obstacles. Positioning multiple selectables on distinct goal tiles triggers the win condition.
